description:
Use the polyline tool in Weasis to trace a path of at least 4 segments on the loaded DICOM image and measure the total path length. Save a screenshot showing the image, the polyline, and the measurement label to /home/ga/DICOM/exports/polyline_screenshot.png. Create a text report at /home/ga/DICOM/exports/polyline_report.txt documenting the measurement with exactly these lines:
Tool: Polyline
Segments: <number of segments>
Total Length: <value> <unit>
Image: <filename of the loaded DICOM>
